title: 2025-09-09 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 2.31
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-09-09: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 2.31/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
